sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35989" key="e)/noula" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔνουλα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">οὖλον</etym>) <sense id="n35989.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gums inside the teeth,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:94" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.94</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
